entity_defs.name: Boolean
entity_defs.title: Boolean
entity_defs.instructions: Use to represent boolean values in text.

entity_defs.name: Date
entity_defs.title: Date
entity_defs.instructions: Use to represent dates in text.

entity_defs.name: Exact Text
entity_defs.title: Exact Text
entity_defs.instructions: Use to represent text that appears verbatim in text.

entity_defs.name: Inferred Text
entity_defs.title: Inferred Text
entity_defs.instructions: Use for text that might not appear verbatim in the text.

entity_defs.name: Monetary Quantity
entity_defs.title: Monetary Quantity
entity_defs.instructions: Use to represent monetary values in text.

entity_defs.name: Number
entity_defs.title: Number
entity_defs.instructions: Use to represent amounts or quantities in text.

label_groups.name: default

label_defs.name: Expense Document
label_defs.instructions: This is the main table for all expense documents. The 'Document Type' field will classify the document, and subsequent child tables will contain details specific to that type.

moon_form.name: Document Type
moon_form.instructions: Classify the document into one of the predefined types: 'Hotel Receipt', 'Dining / Restaurant Bill', 'Flight Ticket', 'Cab Receipt', 'WiFi / Internet Bill'.

moon_form.name: Total Amount
moon_form.instructions: Extract the total amount of the expense. If a currency is present, include it. If not, assume the local currency of the document's origin where the local currency to be determined from within the document by a definite indicator of the country. e.g It can be in address

moon_form.name: Date of Statement
moon_form.instructions: Extract the date when the expense occurred or the document was issued.

moon_form.name: Vendor Name
moon_form.instructions: Extract the name of the vendor or service provider.

label_defs.name: Expense Document > Cab Receipt
label_defs.instructions: Extract specific details from cab receipts (Ola / Uber / printed slip).

moon_form.name: Cab Service Provider
moon_form.instructions: Extract the name of the cab service provider (e.g., Uber, Ola).

moon_form.name: Trip Fare
moon_form.instructions: Extract the base trip fare.

moon_form.name: Tolls, Surcharges, and Fees
moon_form.instructions: Extract the total amount for tolls, surcharges, and other fees.

moon_form.name: Wait Time Charges
moon_form.instructions: Extract charges for wait time, if applicable.

moon_form.name: Taxes
moon_form.instructions: Extract any applicable taxes (e.g., IGST).

moon_form.name: Total Amount
moon_form.instructions: Extract the total amount paid for the cab ride.

label_defs.name: Expense Document > Dining / Restaurant Bill
label_defs.instructions: Extract specific details from dining or restaurant bills.

moon_form.name: Restaurant Name
moon_form.instructions: Extract the name of the restaurant.

moon_form.name: Subtotal
moon_form.instructions: Extract the subtotal before taxes and service charges.

moon_form.name: Service Charge
moon_form.instructions: Extract the service charge amount.

moon_form.name: VAT Amount
moon_form.instructions: Extract the VAT (Value Added Tax) amount.

moon_form.name: Government Taxes
moon_form.instructions: Extract any other government taxes.

moon_form.name: Grand Total
moon_form.instructions: Extract the grand total amount.

label_defs.name: Expense Document > Flight Ticket
label_defs.instructions: Extract specific details from flight tickets (e-ticket or printed).

moon_form.name: Passenger Name
moon_form.instructions: Extract the full name of the passenger.

moon_form.name: Airline Name
moon_form.instructions: Extract the name of the airline.

moon_form.name: Booking ID
moon_form.instructions: Extract the booking identification number.

moon_form.name: PNR
moon_form.instructions: Extract the Passenger Name Record (PNR).

moon_form.name: Ticket Number
moon_form.instructions: Extract the ticket number.

moon_form.name: Departure City
moon_form.instructions: Extract the departure city.

moon_form.name: Arrival City
moon_form.instructions: Extract the arrival city.

moon_form.name: Flight Date
moon_form.instructions: Extract the date of the flight.

moon_form.name: Fare Charges
moon_form.instructions: Extract the base fare charges.

moon_form.name: Service Fees
moon_form.instructions: Extract any service fees.

moon_form.name: Taxes
moon_form.instructions: Extract any applicable taxes (e.g., CGST, SGST, IGST). If more than one form of taxes found e.g. if both CGST and SGST are found, return a sum as the total taxes.

moon_form.name: Total Booking Amount
moon_form.instructions: Extract the total amount paid for the flight booking.

label_defs.name: Expense Document > Hotel Receipt
label_defs.instructions: Extract specific details from hotel receipts.

moon_form.name: Guest Name
moon_form.instructions: Extract the full name of the guest.

moon_form.name: Check-in Date
moon_form.instructions: Extract the check-in date.

moon_form.name: Check-out Date
moon_form.instructions: Extract the check-out date.

moon_form.name: Room Number
moon_form.instructions: Extract the room number, if available.

moon_form.name: Number of Nights
moon_form.instructions: Calculate the number of nights stayed based on check-in and check-out dates, or extract directly if available.

moon_form.name: Room Charges
moon_form.instructions: Extract the amount charged for the room.

moon_form.name: Taxes
moon_form.instructions: Extract the total tax amount.

label_defs.name: Expense Document > WiFi / Internet Bill
label_defs.instructions: Extract specific details from WiFi or Internet bills.

moon_form.name: Service Provider Name
moon_form.instructions: Extract the name of the internet service provider.

moon_form.name: Account Holder Name
moon_form.instructions: Extract the name of the account holder.

moon_form.name: Account Number
moon_form.instructions: Extract the account number for the internet service. This account can sometimes be even listed in the summary of the charges.

moon_form.name: Plan Name
moon_form.instructions: Extract the name of the internet plan.

moon_form.name: Statement Date
moon_form.instructions: Extract the date the statement was issued.

moon_form.name: Statement Period Start Date
moon_form.instructions: Extract the start date of the billing period.

moon_form.name: Statement Period End Date
moon_form.instructions: Extract the end date of the billing period.

moon_form.name: Total Amount Payable
moon_form.instructions: Extract the total amount due for the bill.

moon_form.name: Due Date
moon_form.instructions: Extract the payment due date.

moon_form.name: Basic Amount
moon_form.instructions: Extract the basic amount for the plan/pack charges.

moon_form.name: Taxes (GST)
moon_form.instructions: Extract the total GST amount.

label_groups.instructions: This schema is designed to extract key information from various employee expense documents to facilitate analysis and automation of expense processing. The document type will be inferred first, and then specific details relevant to that document type will be extracted.
